snippet.title: Presidential Lecture Series: Patrick Gelsinger
snippet.description:
Intel Corp. Chief Executive Patrick Gelsinger, who has over four decades of technology leadership and experience in driving innovation, joined Purdue University President Mung Chiang as part of the Presidential Lecture Series.
Gelsinger presented “Welcome to the Siliconomy: Semiconductors and the Supply Chain,” at 5 p.m. Oct. 19, Loeb Playhouse, Stewart Center

snippet.title: Intel CEO Patrick Gelsinger takes pay cut amid cost reduction plans
snippet.description:
